newsBoard.description: elcome to the Land of Karchan MUD, a land filled with mystery and enchantment, where weapons, magic, intelligence, and common sense play key roles in the realm. Where love and war can be one and the same. Where elves coexist peacefully with the humans, and make war with the dwarves. Where the sun rises, and the moon falls. Where one can change into a hero with a single swipe of his sword.

messages.message:
Newbies

Hi!

Here is a short list of commands you can use to navigate Karchan:

newbie geography - Gives a shortened explanation of our geography, along with directions on how to get to each place from the road.
newbie guide - Has a list of commonly used commands and how they work.
newbie road - Takes you to the Road in Central Karchan, a usual hub and focal point of many roleplays.
study atlas - Gives you an atlas that has maps and city information to help you better navigate our expansive game. You can look at it by typing look at atlas and read atlas.

Always remember that we have a discord server (the link is on the main page), if you need extra help. Utilizing the ooc channel can also be beneficial as you're learning the game.

Administrators on this game are referred to as Deputies. We hope you enjoy what we have to offer!

The Deputy Team
messages.name: Victoria
